turns.speaker: user
turns.text: rewrite these three thoughts into more coherent, professional, and pithy statements in the fashion of a management consultant: 1) typically AGI is concerned with double payment when there are multiple people being paid on a deal for the same sales motion; 2) in this case we see across the app and awm sales process, payment for different sales motions at different stages; 3) given that a dollar of inflow can happen at different points in the sales flow and given that there isn't as much overlap in roll responsibility across the different stages, agi contends that there should be less concern over double payment

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: AGI commonly worries about double payment when several parties receive payment for the same sales motion. However, in this instance, payment occurs at various stages across the app and AWM sales process. Therefore, since a dollar of inflow can enter at distinct points within the flow, and considering there is less overlap in roll responsibility across different stages, AGI concludes there is less apprehension regarding double payment.
